operation.add: <input type="hidden" name="seqnum" value="', $context['form_sequence_number'], '">', (!empty($_POST['blog_post']) ? ' <input type="hidden" name="blog_post" value="' . $_POST['blog_post'] . '">' : ''), (!empty($_POST['blog_name']) ? echo '
', $txt['blog_board'], '
', $txt['blog_board_desc'], '

'; if (empty($context['board']['is_recycle']) && empty($context['board']['topics']))
